title: nephrodium pteroides
intro: Nephrodium pteroides, also known as the Pteris fern or Pteris fern plant, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the genus Pteris. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium pteroides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antacid. Nephrodium pteroides is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in water to make a decoction, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
